Description:

Usage:
  nitro [command] [options]

Options:
  --cloud-url <cloud-url>  The url of the api. [env: NITRO_CLOUD_URL] [default: api.chillicream.com]
  --api-key <api-key>      The api key that is used for the authentication [env: NITRO_API_KEY]
  --output <Json|json>     The format in which the result should be displayed, if this option is set, the console will be non-interactive and the result will be displayed in the specified format [env: NITRO_OUTPUT_FORMAT]
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

Commands:
  api-key               Use this command to manage api keys
  api                   Manage apis
  client                Upload, publish and validate clients
  environment           Use this command to manage environments
  launch                This command launches Nitro in your default browser
  login                 This command logs you in with a user account. Nitro CLI will try to launch a web browser to log you in interactively
  logout                Log out to remove access to Nitro
  schema                Upload, publish and validate schemas
  fusion-configuration  Manage fusion configurations
  stage                 Manage stages
  workspace             Use this command to manage workspaces
  pat                   Use this command to manage personal access tokens

  nitro client [command] [options]

Options:
  --cloud-url <cloud-url>  The url of the api. [env: NITRO_CLOUD_URL] [default: api.chillicream.com]
  --api-key <api-key>      The api key that is used for the authentication [env: NITRO_API_KEY]

Commands:
  publish      Publish a client version to an stage
  unpublish    Unpublish a client version from an stage
  validate     Validate a client version
  upload       Upload a new client version
  create       Creates a new client
  delete <id>  Deletes a client
  list         Lists all clients of an api
  show <id>    Shows details of an client
  download     Download the queries from a stage
